name: Hot/Cold Table Splitting
description: Split a large fact table into hot (recent) and cold (historical) partitions and create a unified view

checks.name: hot + cold = 10000 rows total
checks.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_sales_hot) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_sales_cold) AS total;
checks.description: No rows should be lost when splitting the table

checks.name: No overlap between hot and cold
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_sales_hot h JOIN fact_sales_cold c ON h.sale_id = c.sale_id;
checks.description: Each row should appear in exactly one table (hot or cold)

checks.name: View returns all 10000 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM v_fact_sales_all;
checks.description: The UNION view must seamlessly combine hot and cold

checks.name: Hot table contains only recent data
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_sales_hot WHERE sale_date < (SELECT MAX(sale_date) - INTERVAL 6 MONTH FROM fact_sales_full);
checks.description: fact_sales_hot must only contain sales from the last 6 months
